UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-22-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Centerstone Realty is present. Represented by Lonnie Jackson.
Attorney Brenda Cruz Keith for the plaintiff.
Defendant Norm Clegg is present.
Attorney E. Vanessa Henlon appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JUL-22-2013 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
